---
title : "Figures 11.2 & 11.3"
subtitle : "Double descent curves for random non-linear features"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function normalize_rows(X)
    return X ./ sqrt.(sum(X.^2, dims=2))
end

function run_double_descent_simulation(;
        seed=1, d=5, ntrain=200, ntest=200, sigma=2.0
    )
    rng = MersenneTwister(seed)
    w0 = randn(rng, d)

    # Generate data
    Xtrain = normalize_rows(randn(rng, ntrain, d))
    ytrain = 1.0 ./ (0.25 .+ (Xtrain * w0).^2) + sigma * randn(rng, ntrain)

    Xtest = normalize_rows(randn(rng, ntest, d))
    ytest = 1.0 ./ (0.25 .+ (Xtest * w0).^2) + sigma * randn(rng, ntest)

    ms = 0:800
    W_rffs = normalize_rows(randn(rng, maximum(ms), d))

    train_errors = zeros(length(ms))
    test_errors = zeros(length(ms))

    for (im, m) in enumerate(ms)
        if m == 0
            train_errors[im] = mean(ytrain.^2)
            test_errors[im] = mean(ytest.^2)
        else
            Phi_train = max.(Xtrain * W_rffs[1:m, :]', 0.0)
            Phi_test = max.(Xtest * W_rffs[1:m, :]', 0.0)

            V = (Phi_train' * Phi_train + 1e-12 * I * ntrain) \ (Phi_train' * ytrain)

            train_errors[im] = mean((ytrain .- Phi_train * V).^2)
            test_errors[im] = mean((ytest .- Phi_test * V).^2)
        end
    end

    # Regularization by square norm
    lambdas = 10.0 .^ (-12:0.25:4)
    train_errors_lambda = zeros(length(lambdas))
    test_errors_lambda = zeros(length(lambdas))

    m_max = maximum(ms)
    Phi_train_max = max.(Xtrain * W_rffs', 0.0)
    Phi_test_max = max.(Xtest * W_rffs', 0.0)

    for (ilambda, lambda) in enumerate(lambdas)
        V = (Phi_train_max' * Phi_train_max + lambda * I * ntrain) \ (Phi_train_max' * ytrain)
        train_errors_lambda[ilambda] = mean((ytrain .- Phi_train_max * V).^2)
        test_errors_lambda[ilambda] = mean((ytest .- Phi_test_max * V).^2)
    end

    return ms, train_errors, test_errors, lambdas,
        train_errors_lambda, test_errors_lambda, ntrain
end
```

```{julia}
ms, train_errs, test_errs, lambdas,
    train_lambda, test_lambda, ntrain = run_double_descent_simulation()

fig = Figure(size=(1200, 900), fontsize=18)

# Row 1: Underparameterized regime & Ridge regularisation (Figure 11.2)
ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1], xlabel="number of random features", ylabel="test error",
           title="Feature cardinality (underparameterized)", limits=((0, ntrain - 1), (0, 19.0)))
lines!(ax1, ms[1:ntrain], train_errs[1:ntrain], color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax1, ms[1:ntrain], test_errs[1:ntrain], color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax1, position=:lt)

ax2 = Axis(
    fig[1, 2], xlabel=L"-\log_{10}(\lambda)", ylabel="test error",
    title="Regularization parameter",
    limits=((minimum(-log10.(lambdas)),
    maximum(-log10.(lambdas))), (0, 19.0))
)
lines!(ax2, -log10.(lambdas), train_lambda, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax2, -log10.(lambdas), test_lambda, color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax2, position=:lt)

# Row 2: Full Double Descent (Figure 11.3)
ax3 = Axis(
    fig[2, :], xlabel="number of random features", ylabel="test error",
    title="Feature cardinality (full range)",
    limits=((0, maximum(ms)), (0, 19.0))
)
lines!(ax3, ms, train_errs, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="train")
lines!(ax3, ms, test_errs, color=red, linewidth=2, label="test")
axislegend(ax3, position=:rb)

fig
```
